steps.title: Identify what the student needs to communicate
steps.content: The student's goal is to “indicate how long John Cage's musical piece will last.” The notes provide the essential detail: “The performance will last 639 years.”

steps.title: Select the choice that includes the duration
steps.content: The correct answer directly includes “Lasting 639 years,” stating the specific duration needed to accomplish the goal. The other three choices address location, composer identity, or current status but never mention the duration at all. That is the correct answer.
